rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not directly conflict with the dyslexia allotment under Educ. Code §48.103, which is calculated as the basic allotment multiplied by 0.1 and is not tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax values.
quote: Subject to Subsection (b), for each student that a school district serves who has been identified as having dyslexia or a related disorder, the district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment multiplied by 0.1 or a greater amount provided by appropriation.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue may result from reduced property tax base, but the dyslexia allotment formula is independent of homestead exemption levels.
